prose: Frontier-orbital energies for ethylene (C₂H₄, 6 atoms) were computed at DFT tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fit RKS) in PySCF — on the user-supplied geometry as a single-point calculation (gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1). SCF converged in 6 cycles. The headline HOMO–LUMO gap is 7.4357165 eV (HOMO = −7.6155818 eV, LUMO = −0.17986527 eV). The integrity check returned trustworthy: true, all checks passed. No warnings were reported by the engine.
